data.title: Economist Accuses Trump Tariffs Of 'Wrecking The World Economy', Predicts Ways In Which China Will Retaliate
data.description: US economist Jeffrey Sachs warns of potential catastrophe as Trump's tariff policies wreak havoc on global economy.

data.title: Social Security Payments For Group 3 Retirees To Be Sent On April 16: What You Need To Know About Your Benefits
data.description: Social Security payments for Group 3 retirees will be sent on April 16, based on retirement date and birthdate.

data.title: 5 Stocks In The Spotlight From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Last Week
EU Threatens Additional Taxes On US Tech Giants Amid Ongoing Tariff War: 'We Are Developing Retaliatory Measures', Says Von der Leyen
data.description: The European Union (EU) is contemplating imposing levies on U.S. tech giants like Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) and Google (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) if the ongoing tariff negotiations with the Trump administration fail to be resolved.

data.title: Michael Saylor Signals Resumption Of Strategy's Bitcoin-Buying Streak After A Week's Break: 'No Tariffs On Orange Dots'
data.description: Michael Saylor, co-founder and executive chairman of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR), hinted at a resumption of its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) buying streak following a week’s pause.
